description.zh: 进入决赛 全国前二十
description.en: Enter the finals, top 20 in the country

title.zh: 国家奖学金及其它部分奖状/证明
title.en: National Scholarship and Some Other Awards and Certificates

description.zh: 在读期间部分获奖情况
description.en: Awards received during the study period

title.zh: 校级/院级毕业典礼 中英双语 学生代表发言
title.en: School/College Graduation Ceremony (Bilingual Version) - Speech by Student Representative

description.zh: 作为校级与院级学生代表在各级毕业典礼上做总结发言，其中一场中文一场英文
description.en: As student representatives at the school and college levels, they delivered closing speeches at various graduation ceremonies, one in Chinese and one in English.

description.zh: 在校期间多次面向学生/家长举办学习经验/保研经验等各类分享会
description.en: During my time at school, I held various sharing sessions for students and parents, covering topics such as study experiences and applications for graduate school.

description.zh: 代表学院参加校英语演讲大赛
description.en: Represent the college to participate in the school's English speech contest

description.zh: 参与为期三天的华为开发者大会，在早餐会等活动与技术/产品负责人深度交流
description.en: Participated in the three-day Huawei Developer Conference, having in-depth exchanges with technical/product managers during breakfast sessions and other activities.

description.zh: 学院唯一入选，最终获得银奖
description.en: The college was the only one to be selected and ultimately won the silver award.

title.en: Group photo of the student union cadres.

description.zh: 本科在校期间任学生会主席，获优秀学生骨干称号
description.en: During my undergraduate years, I served as the president of the student union and was awarded the title of "Outstanding Student Leader".

title.en: The lead singer of the music program

description.zh: 在学生会多次举办音乐节，也作为演出人员参与歌唱节目
description.en: During my school years, apart from organizing several music festivals, I also participated as a performer in singing programs.
